productDisplayName: Baggit Women Zanzil Taj Green Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece inspired by the clutch bag, is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette, opens with a press buttonFive card holders on the left side and four on the rightOne id card holder and two pockets on the leftOne compartment on the rightA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
